# Middleware docs redirection (2026-02-02 14:42Z)

_**User**_

update the middleware so that /docs always takes to the docs website and not to the login page 

@vercel.json (1-12)

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
The user wants to update the middleware so that `/docs` routes always go to the docs website (via the Vercel rewrite) and not to the login page. This means the middleware should not intercept or redirect `/docs` routes.

Let me first read the middleware file to understand the current implementation.</details></think>

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
I can see the middleware. The issue is that `/docs` routes are being caught by the middleware and redirected to the login page for unauthenticated users (line 38-39). 

I need to add a check for `/docs` routes and allow them to pass through without authentication. This will let the Vercel rewrite handle them properly.

I'll add a check for docs routes similar to how auth routes and debug routes are handled.</details></think>

---

I can see the issue. The middleware is redirecting unauthenticated users to the login page, which intercepts `/docs` before the Vercel rewrite can handle it. I'll add an exception for `/docs` routes.

---

---

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
The change was made successfully. Now `/docs` and `/docs/*` routes will pass through the middleware without being redirected to the login page, allowing the Vercel rewrite to handle them and proxy to the Mintlify docs site.</details></think>

---

Done. The middleware now allows `/docs` routes to pass through without authentication, so they'll be handled by the Vercel rewrite to your Mintlify docs site instead of redirecting to the login page.
